name: Activity
description: Natural-language activity logger. Type what you did — "3×5 deadlift at 100kg", "ran 5k in 24 min", "hiked 8h in Hawaii" — and it parses, lets you confirm, auto-categorizes, and groups it into sessions. Strength PRs (e1RM), cardio bests, weekly category volume, per-category stats, and a year-at-a-glance streak heatmap. Works for the gym and far beyond it.
author: mobius-os
